_comment: Scenario probes for P1 slim (single practitioner, dynamic location, simplified routing table): covers CONFIRMATION spoken phrase + tool in same turn, slot-offer count, wrong-intent on confirm, and asap_slots routing.

scenarios.name: C1 — Confirmation: spoken phrase AND universal_router confirm_time in same response

history.content: I'd like to come in Wednesday morning

[smart_voice_agent response]: {"found": true, "response_type": "availability", "session_id": "sess_abc", "first_available": {"practitioner_name": "Sarah Jones", "practitioner_id": "prac_1", "business_id": "biz_1", "business_name": "Northside Clinic", "date": "2026-06-17", "day_of_week": "Wednesday", "time": null}, "practitioners": [{"practitioner_name": "Sarah Jones", "practitioner_id": "prac_1", "dates": [{"date": "2026-06-17", "slot_groups": {"morning": ["9:00 AM", "10:30 AM"]}, "business_id": "biz_1", "business_name": "Northside Clinic"}]}]}

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: (1) agent speaks a confirmation phrase containing '9:00 AM', 'Wednesday', and 'the 17th' with Sarah's name AND (2) calls universal_router intent='confirm_time' with appointment_date='2026-06-17' and appointment_time='09:00' in the SAME response turn. FAIL if agent speaks the phrase on this turn without calling the tool, calls the tool without speaking, splits the phrase and tool call across two turns, or calls smart_voice_agent instead of universal_router.

scenarios.name: S1 — Slot count: exactly 2 times when band has 4 slots

history.content: [smart_voice_agent response]: {"found": true, "response_type": "availability", "session_id": "sess_abc", "first_available": {"practitioner_name": "Sarah Jones", "practitioner_id": "prac_1", "business_id": "biz_1", "business_name": "Northside Clinic", "date": "2026-06-18", "day_of_week": "Thursday", "time": null}, "practitioners": [{"practitioner_name": "Sarah Jones", "practitioner_id": "prac_1", "dates": [{"date": "2026-06-18", "slot_groups": {"afternoon": ["12:00 PM", "1:30 PM", "3:00 PM", "4:30 PM"]}, "business_id": "biz_1", "business_name": "Northside Clinic"}]}]}

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent speaks exactly two times: 12:00 PM and 4:30 PM (first and last only), e.g. 'I've got 12:00 PM or 4:30 PM with Sarah — does either of those work for you?' FAIL if agent lists 3 or 4 times (12:00 PM, 1:30 PM, 3:00 PM, 4:30 PM) or speaks only one time.

scenarios.name: W1 — Wrong intent: confirm with universal_router not smart_voice_agent

history.content: [smart_voice_agent response]: {"found": true, "response_type": "availability", "session_id": "sess_abc", "first_available": {"practitioner_name": "Sarah Jones", "practitioner_id": "prac_1", "business_id": "biz_1", "business_name": "Northside Clinic", "date": "2026-06-22", "day_of_week": "Monday", "time": null}, "practitioners": [{"practitioner_name": "Sarah Jones", "practitioner_id": "prac_1", "dates": [{"date": "2026-06-22", "slot_groups": {"morning": ["8:00 AM", "9:00 AM"]}, "business_id": "biz_1", "business_name": "Northside Clinic"}]}]}
I've got 8:00 AM or 9:00 AM with Sarah — does either of those work for you?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='confirm_time' (with spoken confirmation phrase per OUTPUT CONTRACT). FAIL if agent calls smart_voice_agent with any intent for confirmation — the TOOL LOCK FOR CONFIRMATION states that calling smart_voice_agent for time confirmation is a protocol violation.

scenarios.name: N1 — ASAP intent: asap_slots with today start_date on 'next available' request
scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent says 'Checking that now, one moment.' and calls smart_voice_agent with intent='asap_slots' and start_date equal to today's date from {{current_time_local}} (YYYY-MM-DD format). FAIL if agent calls intent='availability' without a date, calls intent='find_next_available', or speaks dates without calling the tool.
